metrics.top_terms: layer, teaching, this, formal, with, that, conservation, laws, must, factors, factor, open, does, organization, same

sections.title: Layer 3 — The Teaching Layer
sections.text:
**The human-facing organization. How we name the laws when we explain them.**
**POF 2828 | May 2, 2026 | Negotiable layer — must be consistent with Layer 1 and Layer 2**
---

sections.title: What This Layer Is
sections.text:
This layer is for **explaining** the framework to humans — students, readers, viewers, hostile critics, sympathetic readers, family. It organizes the ten formal factors into a sequence of "law chapters" that read as a story.
The teaching layer is where Theophysics becomes communicable.
It is also the layer where drift historically happened, because teaching language wants to be intuitive, and intuitive language wants to drift toward whatever metaphor lands best in the moment. So this layer is **negotiable but not sloppy**. It must always reduce cleanly to Layer 1 (formal) and Layer 2 (physical-theological mathematics).
---

sections.title: The Critical Distinction
sections.text:
**Number of formal factors:** 10. Always 10. Locked at Layer 1.
**Number of teaching law chapters:** 9 or 10. Negotiable. May vary by audience.
These are not the same number-question.
A "factor" is a typed mathematical object in Definition 10.
A "law chapter" is a human-facing explanatory unit.
They do not have to be one-to-one. **This is what frees the teaching layer to consolidate or split chapters without breaking the math.**
---

sections.title: The Current Best Teaching Sequence
sections.text:
After tonight's consolidations (May 2, 2026), the cleanest teaching organization is:
| # | Teaching Law | Spiritual Pairing | Formal Factors Involved |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Gravity / Relativity** (Newton inside Einstein) | Sin ↔ Grace, with Honor as relational frame | G + M (alignment in curved space) |
| 2 | **Motion** (F = ma) | Sin Nature ↔ Grace as Force | M (motion-as-alignment) |
| 3 | **Electromagnetism** | Truth ↔ Deception | E (signal fidelity) |
| 4 | **Strong Force** | Love ↔ Captivity | (binding term — partial coupling of M and F) |
| 5 | **Thermodynamics** | Judgment ↔ Heat Death | S_prod / S_eff (entropy production) |
| 6 | **Information** | Logos ↔ Chaos | K (compression) |
| 7 | **Quantum / Time / Phase** (consolidated) | Faith ↔ Doubt; Time ↔ Consequence; Statistics ↔ Prayer | Q + R + T as a unified movement |
| 8 | (open — see notes) | — | — |
| 9 | **Weak Force / Moral Conservation** | Sin (directional) ↔ Grace deficit | F (directional decay) |
| 10 | **Coherence** | Christ; Resurrection ↔ Conservation as named corollary | C (integrator) |
**Key observations from this organization:**
- **Law 1 absorbs old "Relativity" (canonical Law 8).** Newton-inside-Einstein means gravity and relativity are the same physical law at two depths. The canonical April 16 doc cited Einstein's field equation under both Law 1 and Law 8 — that was a doubling. Consolidated here.
- **Law 7 becomes a unified movement.** Quantum collapse, irreversible time, and consequence-as-locked-state are three angles on one phenomenon. The formal factors Q, R, T remain distinct (Layer 1 is non-negotiable), but at the teaching layer they cluster as one law-movement.
- **Law 10 absorbs Wolfram's Resurrection insight as named corollary.** Resurrection ↔ Conservation isn't a new law; it is what Law 10 (Coherence/Christ) entails when conservation closure is considered across time.
- **Slot 8 is left open.** Tonight's consolidations created an open slot. Do not fill it just to preserve the number 10. The right answer may be that the teaching layer has 9 chapters while the formal layer has 10 factors — and that is structurally fine.
---

sections.title: Wolfram's Two Strong Pairings (folded in)
sections.text:
Wolfram's conversation produced two pairings the canonical didn't have explicitly. Both fold in cleanly here:
1. **Resurrection ↔ Conservation** → named corollary of Law 10 (above)
2. **Statistics ↔ Prayer / Probability Distortion** → named corollary inside Law 7 (Quantum movement). PEAR-LAB and Global Consciousness Project data are exactly the empirical signature of this corollary.
---

sections.title: The Three Asymmetric Anchors
sections.text:
In this teaching organization, three laws are irreducibly directional and form a flow structure:
**Law 1 (Gravity/Relativity)** — the inflow / source
**Law 7 (Quantum/Time/Phase)** — the present-moment collapse / actualization
**Law 9 (Weak / Moral Conservation)** — the ledger settlement / outflow accounting
Grace flows in (Law 1), gets actualized through faith in the present moment (Law 7), and the moral ledger closes through directional decay and atonement (Law 9). The other six laws (2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8) carry the symmetric machinery between source and settlement. Law 10 integrates everything.
This is a real structural feature. Three irreducibly directional moments. Six symmetric carriers. One integrator. The flow structure of the framework.
---

sections.title: Audience-Specific Teaching Variants
sections.text: Different audiences need different framings of this same structure:

sections.title: Physicist-first
sections.text: Lead with the formal factors (Layer 1). Show the typed domains. Show the corrected Master Equation with S_eff. Get sign-off on the math before introducing any theological pairings. The Lean kernel is the artifact.

sections.title: Theologian-first
sections.text: Lead with the spiritual readings (Layer 2 right column). Show how Sin/Grace/Truth/Love/Faith/Logos/Christ map structurally onto the same algebra. Use Newton-inside-Einstein as the warm-up analogy. Show the Atonement as a boundary condition closing the conservation ledger.

sections.title: Public / TikTok / Substack
sections.text: Lead with the surface insight: "the same equation governs physics and theology." Then drop *one* example that lands hard — Quantum-collapse-as-faith, or Newton-inside-Einstein-as-grace, or moral-conservation-as-ledger. Don't try to land all ten in one piece. Build over a series.

sections.title: Hostile reviewer
sections.text:
Lead with the Lean verification (Layer 1). Show that the structural properties are formally proven. Invite the reviewer to break a property. Hold the line that the framework is testable: each law has explicit kill conditions in the canonical doc, and the formal layer is now machine-verifiable.
---

sections.title: The No-Drift Rule for This Layer
sections.text:
Anyone working at this layer must obey:
1. **Never contradict Layer 1.** If a teaching framing implies a factor merge, factor split, or χ-as-factor, the framing is wrong, not the formal layer.
2. **Always reduce to Layer 2.** Every teaching pairing must be derivable from the ten-row physical/spiritual table.
3. **Mark drift candidates explicitly.** When a teaching framing simplifies for clarity, note what was simplified (e.g., "this is the Newton-limit reading; full GR is in Layer 2").
4. **The number of teaching laws is 9 or 10.** Never argue for 11 or 8. The factor count is fixed at 10; the teaching count tracks closely but may differ by 1 due to consolidation.
---

sections.title: The Three-Layer Reconciliation Test
sections.text:
Before publishing anything (paper, Substack post, TikTok video, presentation, conversation summary), the test is:
```
1. Does the public-facing claim reduce cleanly to a Layer 2 pairing?
2. Does the Layer 2 pairing reduce cleanly to a Layer 1 factor?
3. Does the Layer 1 factor have its formal domain and verified property in the Lean kernel?
```
If all three answer yes, the claim is consistent. If any one breaks, drift has appeared somewhere and must be fixed before publication.
---

sections.title: Tonight's Open Items
sections.text:
These were generated by the May 2, 2026 consolidation session and are not yet resolved:
1. **Slot 8 is open.** Should it stay open (9 teaching laws), or does it have a real occupant we haven't named?
2. **Wolfram's Honor↔Frame Integrity** — does it live inside Law 1 (Gravity/Relativity) as the relational reading, or does it deserve its own slot?
3. **The 1-7-9 asymmetric anchors** — is the three-asymmetric-laws observation structurally significant, or just an artifact of how we ordered the laws?
4. **Vault language reconciliation.** The current `NO_DRIFT_CANONICAL_LAWS.md` uses "raw S" language. The Lean-verified equation uses S_eff. The vault must be updated to match the corrected math.
These are tomorrow's work. Tonight, the layer separation itself is the win.
---
*Source: Canonical April 16 doc + May 2, 2026 consolidation session + GPT verification + Lean kernel*
*This is a NEGOTIABLE layer. The formal layer (Layer 1) and the physical-theological layer (Layer 2) are the source of truth. This layer organizes them for human consumption.*
*Status: PROPOSED TEACHING ORGANIZATION — review fresh, reorganize as needed, update freely as long as Layer 1 and Layer 2 stay consistent.*
